triggers.prompt_regex: \b(connector|external tool|invoke|affordance|search tools|which tool|reachable|reachability|transitive closure|shortest path|weighted path|cheapest route|route_operation|counts?|how many|aggregates?|aggregations?|grouped by|set operations?|set difference|intersection|union|joins?)\b

context.directive: Keep connector details behind tool_search/invoke instead of advertising every spoke as a flat model tool. For graph or tabular questions with an exact answer (reachability, transitive closure, shortest or weighted paths, counts, aggregations, set operations, joins), route to compute_offload.route_operation before reasoning and reason only over the returned facts.
